SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF DELSY LILIANA CHICAS CASTIULLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARLA REYES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
